description: Typed Web Annotation records, durable binding and annotation storage, lifecycle operations, and owner/session isolation.

userStories.title: Add Web Annotation domain types
userStories.description: As a backend engineer, I want shared Web Annotation types so that store, API, tools, and Chat Web use one contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Add TypeScript types for annotation statuses, target kinds, bindings, targets, source hints, viewport, bounding box, screenshot references, and thread messages
Types include ownerScope, piboSessionId, optional piboRoomId, status, note, URL, target metadata, timestamps, and optional binding id
Export types from a location usable by store, API, tools, and Chat Web without creating circular dependencies
Focused type tests or compile checks cover the exported shapes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by shared exports in src/web-annotations/types.ts and src/web-annotations/index.ts. Types cover statuses, target kinds, bindings, targets, source hints, viewport, bounding boxes, screenshot references, thread messages, trusted owner/session fields, timestamps, and create/patch/list input shapes. Docker worker typecheck passed.

userStories.title: Add durable annotation binding storage
userStories.description: As a user, I want browser target bindings tied to my current Pibo Session so that overlay submissions land in the right session.
acceptanceCriteria: Add additive/idempotent storage for bindings keyed by owner scope, Pibo Session ID, optional Room ID, binding id, target id or URL, and created time
Store binding state fields for active/injected/error/closed or equivalent recoverable states
Add store operations to create, list by session, get, patch state, and remove bindings
Binding removal does not delete annotations
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by WebAnnotationStore binding table and operations in src/web-annotations/store.ts. Bindings are keyed by owner scope, Pibo Session ID, optional Room ID, binding id, URL/target id, state, timestamps, metadata, and support create/list/get/patch/remove. Removal marks bindings removed and leaves annotations intact. Focused store tests and Docker worker typecheck passed.

userStories.title: Add durable annotation storage
userStories.description: As an agent, I want annotation records to persist across gateway restarts so that feedback remains inspectable after target cleanup.
acceptanceCriteria: Add additive/idempotent storage for annotations keyed by owner scope, Pibo Session ID, status, created time, and annotation id
Store target metadata, source hints, viewport, URL/title, note, screenshot artifact reference, and optional binding id within bounded fields
Add store operations to create, list by session/status/limit, and get one annotation
List returns newest-first by default and supports a bounded limit
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by durable web_annotations table and create/list/get operations. Records persist owner scope, Pibo Session ID, optional Room ID, binding id, status, created time, URL/title, target metadata/source hints, viewport, screenshot references, and metadata JSON. Lists default newest-first with bounded limits and status filtering. Focused store tests and Docker worker typecheck passed.

userStories.title: Add annotation lifecycle and thread operations
userStories.description: As an agent, I want to update annotation status and add summaries so that the user can track feedback progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Add store operations to acknowledge, resolve, dismiss, and otherwise patch supported statuses with timestamps and optional summary/reason
Reject invalid status values and malformed update payloads
Add a bounded thread-message operation if thread messages are part of the V1 store contract
Persist updatedAt and resolvedAt/resolvedBy where applicable
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by patchAnnotation plus acknowledge/resolve/dismiss helpers and bounded addThreadMessage. Runtime validation rejects invalid statuses, malformed resolvedBy/summary/metadata, empty thread content, and excessive thread messages; updates updatedAt and resolvedAt/resolvedBy where applicable. Focused store tests and Docker worker typecheck passed.

userStories.title: Test owner and session isolation
userStories.description: As a security reviewer, I want store-level isolation tests so that unrelated sessions and owners cannot read or modify each other's annotations.
acceptanceCriteria: Seed annotations for at least two owner scopes and two Pibo Sessions
Verify list/get/update paths require owner scope and return only authorized records
Verify listing annotations for one session does not return another session's annotations
Verify binding removal leaves historical annotations readable by authorized callers
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed by store tests seeding multiple owner scopes and sessions, verifying list/get/update isolation, and confirming binding removal leaves authorized historical annotations readable. Focused store tests and Docker worker typecheck passed.
